text:
isposition of the 5th lord, the
2nd lord is in deep exaltation in Rasi or in Navamsa,
immense wealth and fortune will flow in. He will earn
through sea-products or ship-building when the 5th house is
a movable and watery sign. Consistent with the nature and
characteristics of planets and signs involved, there will be
influx of wealth.
When the 5th lord is in the 11th with the 11th lord,
there will be gain through his sons or Government sources
or elder brother, or one will acquire a new job. As the Dasa
of the 5th lord, when in the 11th with the 11th lord, is a
Yoga Dasa, it is capable of conferring highly beneficial
results. When the 5th lord is in adverse amsas cantrary
results may be expected. There will be losses in business,
reverses in official life, disappointments, misunderstandings
and financial troubles and upheavals.
When the lord of the 5th joins the lord of the 12th in
the 12th (along with the 6th lord) there will be mental
afflictions almost bordering on lunacy.
